lines: * Lightweight deep merge utility for JavaScript objects.
* Recursively merges source into target, returning the merged object.
* @param {object} target - The base object to merge into.
if (typeof source !== 'object' || source === null) return target;
+    if (BLOCKED_KEYS.has(key)) continue; // CVE fix: block prototype pollution keys
"description": "Lightweight deep merge utility for JavaScript objects",
